# RankOnGeo

> Generative Engine Optimization (GEO) platform: tracks how ChatGPT, Claude, Gemini, Perplexity, and Google AI Overviews answer questions about a brand, then helps close the visibility gaps.

RankOnGeo measures brand visibility across 5 AI answer surfaces (ChatGPT, Claude, Gemini, and Perplexity via their own APIs, plus Google's AI Overview via live SERP scraping), finds the real buyer questions where a brand is missing from AI answers ("gap detection"), turns any gap into a citation-optimized article in one click ("gap → article"), and auto-publishes to WordPress (Discord and generic webhooks also auto-publish; other CMSs are copy-paste today). Web and LLM analytics separately track human visitors and real AI-crawler traffic (GPTBot, ClaudeBot, PerplexityBot, Google-Extended, and others) hitting a site.

## Product

- [Homepage](https://www.rankongeo.com/): The measure → research → write → publish → re-measure loop, pricing, and FAQ. The domain input on this page starts the visibility scan directly.
- [About](https://www.rankongeo.com/about): What RankOnGeo is, why it was built, and what the measure/research/write/publish loop does.
- [Early access](https://www.rankongeo.com/early): Flat 50% off every plan for early backers.

## Docs

- [Web Analytics setup](https://www.rankongeo.com/docs/web-analytics): Installing the tracking snippet and what each metric means.
- [LLM Analytics setup](https://www.rankongeo.com/docs/llm-analytics): Detecting and logging real AI-crawler traffic server-side.

## Blog

- [Blog index](https://www.rankongeo.com/blog): Articles on GEO, AI search visibility, and brand citation strategy.

## Optional
